classification.rationale: This thread is coordinating a real-world meetup with substantive structure: a negotiated date (May 21), a venue (Mission Workshop), a run-of-show (doors 6pm, talks at 6:30 and 7:30, social to 9), RSVPs, dietary needs, speaker commitments, and logistical deadlines — exactly the evolving plan state that EventView is designed to surface. The respect_minimal_threads constraint does not apply here because this is far beyond a one-off scheduling ping.

state.title: AI Dev Tools Meetup — May 21
state.status_rationale: Date (May 21) and venue (Mission Workshop) are both locked in per m7 instruction to Mara to confirm with Maya, and the run-of-show has been agreed with speakers.

schedule.item: Sam Hartman — 'Agent Observability' talk (20 min) + Q&A (10 min)
Theo Park — Lightning talk on lineage primitives (10 min)

attendees.note: Lead organizer; collecting RSVPs and dietary list for Maya by May 18.

attendees.note: Venue liaison; needs to formally confirm booking with Maya Singh.

attendees.name: Theo Park
attendees.note: 10-min lightning talk on lineage primitives at 7:30.

attendees.name: Sam Hartman
attendees.note: 20-min talk on agent observability + 10-min Q&A at 6:30. Has custom HDMI dongle; venue has standard dongles but he'll bring his own. Title/abstract due to Iris by Friday May 8.

attendees.name: Jess Tan
attendees.note: Flying in from NYC; flight lands SFO 5:30pm — expect late arrival, likely missing start of Sam's talk. Vegetarian — must be included in dietary list to Maya by May 18.

attendees.name: Maya Singh
attendees.note: Mission Workshop contact. Hard cap 28 ppl (fire code). Needs dietary requirements by Mon May 18 if catering ordered. Venue rate $850.

decisions_log.question: Which date?
decisions_log.resolution: May 21 — May 14 blocked by Theo's visa appointment; May 21 chosen.

decisions_log.question: Which venue?
decisions_log.resolution: Mission Workshop — available May 21, capacity confirmed for 25 (hard cap 28).

decisions_log.question: Speaker lineup?
decisions_log.resolution: Sam Hartman (20-min agent observability talk) + Theo Park (10-min lightning talk on lineage primitives).

decisions_log.question: Run of show?
decisions_log.resolution: 6:00 doors, 6:30 Sam talk+Q&A, 7:30 Theo LT, 7:45 social to 9pm.

decisions_log.question: Order catering via Mission Workshop partner?
Sam Hartman talk title and abstract confirmed?
